name: Cheddar Cheese Crispies
recipeIngredient: 1 Teaspoon Tabasco Sauce (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and grated cheddar cheese together until well blended.
2. Add the sifted flour, salt, and Tabasco sauce; mix until well combined.
3. Incorporate the Rice Krispies into the mixture. Form small balls using teaspoon amounts of dough.
4. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Press each ball with a fork to form a round shape that is about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Bake in a pre-heated oven at 400°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack before serving.
8. Store any leftovers in an airtight container.
Yield: Approximately 50 appetizers
